commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a generic `isStatusNotice` reply payload marker and uses it to show the first agent plan update as a transient status notice while excluding that notice from TTS, commitment extraction, streaming final-content accounting, and reply-threading slot consumption.

Reproducibility: yes. for the introduced compatibility problem: the branch source and patched tests show `verboseLevel: "off"` still sends a plan status notice. I did not run tests because this review is required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is maintainer judgment on whether plan notices may bypass `/verbose off`, plus real chat proof; this is not a safe autonomous repair lane from a read-only review.

target.title: Show plan updates as status notices
target.body:
Summary

- Surface the first agent plan update as a transient chat status notice instead of forwarding verbose plan progress.
- Add a generic `isStatusNotice` reply payload marker so plan/status notices stay out of TTS, commitment extraction, final-content streaming accounting, and reply-threading first-slot consumption.
- Keep the behavior harness-generic: any runtime that emits `stream: "plan"` gets the notice; Codex only maps its existing app-server plan notifications into that stream.

Refs #84534.

Verification

Behavior addressed: First plan updates become visible chat status notices without becoming final assistant answer content.
Real environment tested: Local macOS focused Vitest plus Blacksmith Testbox changed check.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/block-reply-pipeline.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`; `pnpm check:changed` delegated to Blacksmith Testbox.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed: 20 block-reply pipeline tests and 135 dispatch-from-config tests. Autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings. Testbox `tbx_01ks7y09hgwscmjxdhe6ckvm5s` / GitHub Actions run 26290652767 exited 0.
Observed result after fix: Status notices no longer count as streamed final content, no longer suppress later identical assistant content, and plan notices are emitted once on allowed progress surfaces.
What was not tested: Live Telegram/Mantis desktop transcript ordering was not run for this minimal PR.
target.author: steipete
